description: Per-session cert_prep attestation. STRUCTURAL ENFORCEMENT: G15 — no passRate / predictedScore / relativeRanking fields exist in this schema (negative-space enforcement); G16 — questionSource closed enum rejects official-vendor reproduction at PDS write time; G6 — under-18 inherits manabi master aggregate-only via learnerAgeBucket discriminator; encrypted-envelope-only for adult full detail per ADR-2605181100. Per ADR-2605264400.

learnerDidOrPseudonym.description: 30-day rotating pseudonym for under-18 per ADR-2605181200; full DID for adult

learnerAgeBucket.description: G6 discriminator inherited from manabi master

certPathway.description: external credential body knowledge domain (manabi never issues; G17 partnership prohibited)

domain.description: CISA D1-D5 or CISSP D1-D8 within certPathway

questionSource.description: G16 STRUCTURAL: closed enum; official-isaca-reproduced / official-isc2-reproduced / commercial-test-bank-reproduced are NOT valid members and any record carrying such value is schema-rejected

questionSeedsAttempted.description: deterministic sha256 seeds — regenerable; question text bodies are NOT persisted (privacy + copyright)

conceptIdsReviewed.description: CBK concept identifiers touched in this session

encryptedDetailCid.description: Adult only — optional encrypted detail envelope (ADR-2605181100). FORBIDDEN for minors via cell-level validation. Detail body never includes question text, only seeds + concept ids + user notes.

timerModeOptedIn.description: G10 default false (untimed); only true if user explicitly opted in to timer mode in Settings
